basics.name: Yichen Wang
basics.label: Undergraduate Researcher
basics.summary: Senior student in Automation at Tongji University. Research interests in Embodied AI, Robot Learning, and Spatial Perception.

work.name: Tongji University
work.position: Undergraduate Thesis: Context-Aware DRL for Autonomous Mapless Navigation
highlights: Adapted a context-aware DRL framework (CoRL 2023) by customizing the SAC algorithm in PyTorch.
Optimized an attention-based encoder-decoder policy network to process viewpoint graphs.
Validated the navigation policy in Gazebo simulations.

work.name: Tongji University
work.position: Autonomous Navigation and SLAM Deployment for Hexapod Robots
highlights: Deployed a real-time visual SLAM system on physical hexapod robots via ROS.
Co-developed a local path planner integrating spatial perception with rigid body locomotion.
Executed hardware-software integration for collision-free navigation.

work.name: Tongji University
highlights: Engineered a multi-agent simulation engine from scratch in C++ and Python.
Implemented path-planning algorithm and collision-detection logic.

work.name: Tongji University
work.position: Optimal Dispatch Strategy for Electric Fleets via DRL and Transformers
highlights: Developed a framework combining Transformers and DRL for high-dimensional state-action spaces.
Formulated energy-efficient routing and charging schedules for electric bus fleets.

awards.title: Second Prize in National Campus AI Algorithm Competition
